requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Malawi does not currently operate a domestic EV connector mandate, reflecting its nascent EV market. However, Malawi's general regulatory framework follows IEC standards through MBS (Malawi Bureau of Standards), and the country's electricity infrastructure uses IEC-family supply standards (230/400 V 50 Hz). Any EV charging equipment introduced to Malawi is expected to align with IEC 62196 connector standards, which govern the majority of AC and DC EV charging infrastructure in sub-Saharan African markets. AC charging is expected to use the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler, and DC fast charging where deployed is expected to use the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2) defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF. IEC 62196 alignment also ensures compatibility with vehicles sold in Malawi, which are primarily European and Japanese imports — the former using Type 2 / CCS2 and the latter potentially CHAdeMO — rather than Chinese GB/T vehicles. The practical reality is that four-wheel EV penetration in Malawi is extremely low as of 2026, so connector choice is primarily a future-proofing and import-vehicle compatibility consideration rather than an immediate mass-market requirement.
summary.zh: 马拉维目前尚无本国电动汽车接口强制要求，反映出其电动汽车市场的初级阶段。然而，马拉维的总体监管框架通过MBS（马拉维标准局）遵循IEC标准，该国电力基础设施采用IEC体系供电标准（230/400 V 50 Hz）。任何引入马拉维的电动汽车充电设备预计将符合IEC 62196接口标准，该标准在撒哈拉以南非洲市场的交流和直流电动汽车充电基础设施中占主导地位。交流充电预计使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，已部署的直流快充预计使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。IEC 62196兼容性还确保与马拉维销售的车辆兼容，这些车辆主要是欧洲和日本进口车——前者使用Type 2 / CCS2，后者可能使用CHAdeMO——而非中国GB/T车辆。实际情况是，截至2026年，四轮电动汽车在马拉维的普及率极低，因此接口选择主要是面向未来和确保进口车兼容性的考量，而非当前大众市场的迫切需求。
summary.zht: 馬拉威目前尚無本國電動汽車接口強制要求，反映出其電動汽車市場的初級階段。然而，馬拉威的總體監管框架通過MBS（馬拉威標準局）遵循IEC標準，該國電力基礎設施採用IEC體系供電標準（230/400 V 50 Hz）。任何引入馬拉威的電動汽車充電設備預計將符合IEC 62196接口標準，該標準在撒哈拉以南非洲市場的交流和直流電動汽車充電基礎設施中佔主導地位。交流充電預計使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，已部署的直流快充預計使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。IEC 62196兼容性還確保與馬拉威銷售的車輛兼容，這些車輛主要是歐洲和日本進口車——前者使用Type 2 / CCS2，後者可能使用CHAdeMO——而非中國GB/T車輛。實際情況是，截至2026年，四輪電動汽車在馬拉威的普及率極低，因此接口選擇主要是面向未來和確保進口車兼容性的考量，而非當前大眾市場的迫切需求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
MBS (Malawi Bureau of Standards) — IEC-aligned national standards adoption framework

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a broadly similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack. Vehicles sold in Malawi are predominantly European and Japanese imports with Type 2 / CCS2 or CHAdeMO inlets — not GB/T inlets — meaning GB/T chargers cannot physically connect to any vehicle likely to be charged in Malawi.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2大致相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。马拉维销售的车辆以欧洲和日本进口车为主，配备Type 2 / CCS2或CHAdeMO接口——而非GB/T接口——这意味着GB/T充电桩无法与马拉维境内可能充电的任何车辆物理连接。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2大致相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。馬拉威銷售的車輛以歐洲和日本進口車為主，配備Type 2 / CCS2或CHAdeMO接口——而非GB/T接口——這意味著GB/T充電樁無法與馬拉威境內可能充電的任何車輛物理連接。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger cannot physically connect to any four-wheel EV likely to be used in Malawi. Conversion to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC) requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 where CCS2 DC is required), labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for compliant connector design. Additionally, for e-bike and e-moto applications — the more immediate electrification opportunity in Malawi — separate connector and charging standards (IEC 63397, IEC 61851-1 Mode 1/2, or proprietary connectors) apply and are outside the scope of this row.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩无法与马拉维境内可能使用的任何四轮电动汽车物理连接。改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（在需要CCS2直流时从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24）、标签、测试报告、温升证据及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是合规接口设计的替代方案。此外，对于电动自行车和电动摩托车应用——马拉维更为直接的电气化机遇——须适用单独的接口和充电标准（IEC 63397、IEC 61851-1 Mode 1/2或专有接口），不在本行范围之内。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁無法與馬拉威境內可能使用的任何四輪電動汽車物理連接。改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（在需要CCS2直流時從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24）、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是合規接口設計的替代方案。此外，對於電動自行車和電動摩托車應用——馬拉威更為直接的電氣化機遇——須適用單獨的接口和充電標準（IEC 63397、IEC 61851-1 Mode 1/2或專有接口），不在本行範圍之內。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory from a physical compatibility standpoint — GB/T connectors cannot interface with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets used by European and Japanese EV imports dominant in Malawi; IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 adoption expected for any MBS-compliant or project-specified charger; confirm specific project or tender requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute; GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with the vehicle fleet in Malawi

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is a hardware requirement, not a paperwork exercise. GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with the European and Japanese EV imports that make up virtually all four-wheel EVs in Malawi. Confirm the vehicle fleet and any project or MBS specifications before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从GB/T 20234到IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的接口重新设计属于硬件要求，而非文件工作。GB/T接口与马拉维几乎所有四轮电动汽车——即欧洲和日本进口车——的车辆接口物理上不兼容。在报价或发货前，应确认车辆类型以及任何项目或MBS规范要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從GB/T 20234到IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的接口重新設計屬於硬體要求，而非文件工作。GB/T接口與馬拉威幾乎所有四輪電動汽車——即歐洲和日本進口車——的車輛接口物理上不兼容。在報價或發貨前，應確認車輛類型以及任何項目或MBS規範要求。
